---
stack: html-tailwind
detect:
  - file: tailwind.config.js
  - file: tailwind.config.cjs
file_patterns:
  - pattern: tailwind.config.cjs
    purpose: Tailwind configuration — extends theme with brand tokens
  - pattern: src/index.css
    purpose: CSS entry point with Tailwind directives
  - pattern: index.html
    purpose: HTML entry point
token_consumption:
  method: "theme-extend"
  snippet: |
    // tailwind.config.cjs
    // Generated by /frontend-design — DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY
    const tokens = require('.king/design/tokens.sd.json');

    /** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */
    module.exports = {
      content: [
        './src/**/*.{html,js,ts,jsx,tsx}',
        './index.html',
      ],
      theme: {
        extend: {
          colors: {
            primary:   tokens.color.primary,
            secondary: tokens.color.secondary,
            accent:    tokens.color.accent,
            neutral:   tokens.color.neutral,
          },
          fontFamily: {
            heading: [tokens.typography.heading.fontFamily.value, 'sans-serif'],
            body:    [tokens.typography.body.fontFamily.value,    'sans-serif'],
          },
          borderRadius: {
            sm:   '4px',
            md:   '8px',
            lg:   '16px',
            full: '9999px',
          },
        },
      },
      plugins: [
        require('tailwindcss-animate'),
      ],
    };
tailwind_version: "3"
tailwind_v3_config: "tailwind.config.cjs"
tailwind_v4_import: '@import "tailwindcss"'
animation_lib:
  name: tailwindcss-animate
  install: "npm install tailwindcss-animate"
  gpu_safe_patterns:
    - "Use `animate-` utilities: `animate-fade-in`, `animate-slide-in-from-top`"
    - "All tailwindcss-animate keyframes use `opacity` and `transform` — GPU-safe"
    - "Combine with `transition-` utilities for hover/focus states"
    - "Use `motion-reduce:` variant to disable animations: `motion-reduce:animate-none`"
a11y_rules:
  - rule: "Motion-reduce variant on all animations"
    check: "Every `animate-*` class paired with `motion-reduce:animate-none`"
  - rule: "Focus-visible styles"
    check: "Interactive elements have `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary-500`"
  - rule: "Color contrast via Tailwind classes"
    check: "Use semantic color pairs: `bg-neutral-50 text-neutral-900` for light, inverted for dark"
---

## Integration Notes

HTML + Tailwind (v3) uses `tailwind.config.cjs` to extend the theme with brand tokens from `tokens.sd.json` (Style Dictionary format — no `$` prefix in keys). The `theme-extend` method means Tailwind's default palette is preserved alongside brand tokens.

**Tailwind v4 note**: If project uses Tailwind v4 (`tailwindcss >= 4.0.0`), `tailwind.config.cjs` is replaced by CSS-based config. Use `@import "tailwindcss"` and inline theme via `@theme {}` block in CSS:

```css
/* src/index.css — Tailwind v4 */
@import "tailwindcss";

@theme {
  --color-primary-500: #{{PRIMARY_500}};
  --font-heading: '{{HEADING_FONT}}', sans-serif;
  --font-body: '{{BODY_FONT}}', sans-serif;
}
```

**CSS entry** (`src/index.css`, Tailwind v3):

```css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

@layer base {
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family={{HEADING_FONT}}:wght@400;600;700&family={{BODY_FONT}}:wght@400;500&display=swap');

  body {
    @apply font-body bg-neutral-50 text-neutral-900;
  }
}
```

**tokens.sd.json key format** (Style Dictionary, no `$`): Token values are nested objects like `tokens.color.primary["500"].value`. Tailwind's color scale expects an object where keys map directly — the tokens.sd.json format with numeric keys works directly: `tokens.color.primary` becomes `{ 50: { value: '#...' }, 100: { value: '#...' }, ... }`. Tailwind resolves the `value` property automatically when using the nested format.

**Recommended Vite setup** (`vite.config.ts`):

```ts
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';

export default defineConfig({
  css: {
    postcss: {
      plugins: [
        require('tailwindcss'),
        require('autoprefixer'),
      ],
    },
  },
});
```
